components.name: AI Chat Trigger
components.description: Pill-shaped floating button that opens the AI chat panel.
components.css: .ds-ai-trigger { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 20px; background: #359aff; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 24px; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-ai-trigger:hover { background: #0f6dd0; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-ai-trigger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #359aff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Suggestion Chip
components.description: Clickable suggestion card for AI prompts.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 13px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #eef0f1; background: #f8f9fa; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #2e3133; line-height: 1.5; width: 100%; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #e8f3ff; border-color: #a9d3ff; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #359aff; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-chip-icon { flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 13px; margin-top: 1px; }

components.name: Chat Bubble (User)
components.description: User message bubble in AI chat.
components.html: มี Event อะไรบ้างในปีนี้?
components.css: .ds-msg-user { background: #359aff; color: #fff; padding: 9px 13px; border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 16px; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; max-width: 85%; white-space: pre-wrap; }

components.name: Chat Bubble (AI)
components.html:
✦

มีคอนเสิร์ตทั้งหมด 5 งานในปีนี้ครับ
components.css: .ds-ai-avatar { flex-shrink: 0; width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #359aff, #0f6dd0); color: #fff; font-size: 9px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-msg-ai { background: #f8f9fa; color: #1f2123; padding: 9px 13px; border-radius: 4px 16px 16px 16px; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; white-space: pre-wrap; flex: 1; }

components.name: Input Field
components.css: .ds-input { flex: 1; padding: 9px 13px; border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid #d9dcde; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #1f2123; background: #f8f9fa; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8e9499; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #359aff; background: #fff; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.6; } .ds-send { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; background: #359aff; color: #fff; border: none; font-size: 13px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-send:hover { background: #0f6dd0; } .ds-send:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-send:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #359aff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.html: หน้าแรกคอนเสิร์ตภาพรวมติดต่อเรา
components.css: .ds-nav-item { padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #646b70; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f8f9fa; color: #1f2123; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #359aff; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Like a festival's information wall — bold, colorful posters, clear wayfinding, everything you need visible at a glance. The interface feels alive and energetic, not corporate or sterile. It's a digital space where concert-goers and organizers meet, with AI as a friendly guide (not a cold terminal). This system explicitly rejects SaaS-corporate templates, dark-and-moody themes, and motion that distracts rather than guides. Every element earns its place: playful precision.
keyCharacteristics: Bold blue anchor with energetic accents
Clean, flat surfaces that lift on interaction

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Concert Blue carries ≤20% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point — when you see blue, it means something.

rules.name: The Weight Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is expressed through weight first, size second. A headline at 600/1rem has more presence than a label at 500/0.875rem — the weight step is the primary signal.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Depth is conveyed through color, never shadow. A button hover darkens; a card hover shifts background; a selected tab gets a bottom border. If you find a box-shadow outside of modal/tooltip native browser chrome, it's a mistake.

dos: Use Concert Blue sparingly — it's the brand's one voice, make it count.
Use weight over size for hierarchy.
Keep surfaces flat at rest; lift with color on interaction.
Animate with purpose — state transitions (hover, focus, active) in 0.15–0.2s.
Use text-wrap: balance on headings to avoid orphans.
donts: Use box-shadows. Depth comes from color, not shadow.
Use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as colored accent).
Use SaaS-corporate template patterns (big number + small label stats, identical card grids).
Put numbered section markers (01/02/03) above every section.
Use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows ('ABOUT' / 'PROCESS') as a default scaffold.
